scripts.dev: npm run build -w @chessgg/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @chessgg/api" "npm run dev -w @chessgg/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @chessgg/shared && npm run dev -w @chessgg/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @chessgg/shared && npm run dev -w @chessgg/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @chessgg/shared && npm run build -w @chessgg/api && npm run build -w @chessgg/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @chessgg/api && npm run lint -w @chessgg/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @chessgg/shared && npm run typecheck -w @chessgg/api && npm run typecheck -w @chessgg/web
